'''Sky-mine delivery ships''' were used exclusively by the [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]] in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]].<ref name="RP">''[[Rogue Planet]]''</ref>

==Characteristics==
In addition to dropping [[sky mine]]s, they were used as landing craft. Built by [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]] and designed by [[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]] himself, they had weak armor along the bottom.<ref name="RP">''[[Rogue Planet]]''</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}
